text: Merchants unable to e-sign the Merchant Agreement; onboarding stuck at the document step with a permission error in the UI.
Card declines spiking above 6% and processor timeouts; settlement reconciliation falling behind.
Login latency above the 1s SLO and intermittent session-refresh failures on mobile clients.
Multiple services reporting outbound timeouts to external endpoints; egress saturation near the ceiling.
Read-replica lag climbing after a failover; auth and merchant reads returning stale data and timeouts.
E-sign envelope generation latency above 2s and 502s; PDF render workers saturated.
Merchant records displaying stale fields in the onboarding UI after a config update.
Elevated 5xx to web clients concentrated on routes to onboarding-api and auth-service.
